name: OpenClaw Memory System
description: Persistent memory system for OpenClaw multi-agent workflows — keyword indexing, BM25 semantic search, DAG-based memory linking, and session lifecycle hooks.

workspaceRoot.description: Root directory of the OpenClaw workspace (default: ~/.openclaw/workspace-dev)

agentId.description: Default agent ID for memory operations (default: dev)

indexFile.description: Path to the keyword index file

bm25IndexFile.description: Path to the BM25 index file

topN.description: Default number of memories to recall (default: 3)

agentId.label: Default Agent ID
agentId.help: The agent workspace name used for memory isolation

topN.label: Recall Count
topN.help: Number of top memories to return per recall

workspaceRoot.label: Workspace Root
workspaceRoot.help: Override the default workspace root path

author: Jialin (0xcjl)
